top_signals.title: Commission boosts Europe's competitiveness, decarbonisation and independence with Electrification Action Plan and ETS review
top_signals.summary: European Commission Press release Brussels, 17 Jul 2026 The Commission today presents an Electrification Action Plan to make Europe the first electro-powered continent, and a stronger carbon market to support EU's industry in the clean transition and electrification.

top_signals.title: Factsheet on Electrification Action Plan
top_signals.summary: European Commission Factsheet Brussels, 17 Jul 2026   Factsheet on Electrification Action Plan Factsheet on Electrification Action Plan

top_signals.title: Strong soccer teams start with merit, not politics
top_signals.summary: Japan's treatment of the national team's head coach is worlds apart from that of his South Korean counterpart, who was forced into an indignant resignation.
